objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: vol_amplitude_breakout
archetype: vol_amplitude_breakout
family: volatility
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- amplitude_hunter(period=10)
- donchian(period=15)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: amplitude_hunter.score > 0.6 and close > donchian.upper
- short: amplitude_hunter.score > 0.6 and close < donchian.lower
exit:
- condition: amplitude_hunter.score < 0.2 or cross_any(close, donchian.middle)
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.5
tp_atr_mult: 5.0
description: ATR stop-loss (2.5x) and take-profit (5.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Using volatility and amplitude as signals to breakout trades in a trending market.
Identifying breakouts in volatility amplitude can provide a trading edge by combining Bollinger Bands and Donchian Channels indicators, resulting in higher trade quality.
